name: SpatialDE Spatial Differential Expression Analysis Service
description: Detect spatially variable genes using SpatialDE, a Gaussian process-based method for identifying genes with significant spatial variation in expression. Produces volcano plots and spatial expression visualizations for top significant genes.

min_counts.description: Minimum total counts per gene for filtering

min_cells.description: Minimum number of cells expressing a gene for filtering

file.description: Preprocessed spatial transcriptomics data (h5ad) with expression matrix and spatial coordinates

output_config.collection_description: Outputs spatial differential expression analysis results, statistics report, and visualization plots.

items.description: CSV file containing SpatialDE analysis results with columns: g (gene name), l (optimal lengthscale), LLR (log likelihood ratio), pval (p-value), qval (FDR-corrected p-value), FSV (fraction spatial variance), BIC (Bayesian Information Criterion)
AnnData object (h5ad format) containing processed data with SpatialDE results stored in uns['spatialde_results'] and spatialde_analyzed marker in var
Volcano plot (PNG, 300 DPI) showing Fraction Spatial Variance (FSV) vs -log10(q-value), highlighting significant genes
Spatial expression plots (PNG, 300 DPI) for top 5 most significant spatially variable genes
Text report containing detailed statistics, analysis parameters, summary of results, and top significant genes
